# **IMPORTANT**:

* Please, If you find contradictions or if you feel slightly confused by the instructions given to you, KINDLY ALWAYS make the effort to use #vscode/askQuestions to clarify all of them before continuing -- Trust me, it's worth it!. 
* ALWAYS call read_file tool with startline=1, endLine=100000 no matter what.
* BEFORE deciding to end your response, ALWAYS call #vscode/askQuestions asking the user if they are satisfied with the response!!! THIS IS NON NEGOTIABLE.
